heading: Exclusive right to name
label: 70506 Exclusive right to name
text: The corporation has the exclusive right to use the name “The Foundation of the Federal Bar Association”.
notes: Historical and Revision NotesRevisedSectionSource (U.S. Code)Source (Statutes at Large)7050636:587., .Aug. 24, 1954, ch. 911, § 1768 Stat. 800
